news.paragraph: UVXY, currently trading at $35.28, is a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, and recent headlines highlight its inverse relationship with market fear.  While some articles caution against leveraged ETFs, others suggest profiting from VIX spikes and market panic, indicating that traders are considering UVXY in periods of heightened investor anxiety.  The news context points to potential volatility-driven opportunities, but also inherent risks associated with leveraged products.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
2 Ways To Profit as the VIX Spikes — No Matter What Comes Next
